title: selaginella grabowskyi
intro: Selaginella grabowskyi is a species of evergreen, perennial plant, belonging to the Selaginellaceae family, commonly known as spikemoss. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Selaginella grabowskyi include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and exhibit immunomodulatory effects. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, or tinctures, and is traditionally consumed to alleviate various health issues, including fever, cough, and respiratory problems.
